scripts.dev:mac: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue.bold,green.bold --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend:mac" "npm run dev:frontend:mac"
scripts.dev:backend:mac: node scripts/preflight-backend.js && cd backend && ([ -d .venv ] || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q --disable-pip-version-check && .venv/bin/uvicorn api.app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:backend:win: node scripts/preflight-backend.js && cd backend && (if not exist .venv python -m venv .venv) && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt -q --disable-pip-version-check && .venv\Scripts\uvicorn api.app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:frontend:mac: node scripts/preflight-frontend.js && cd frontend && npm install --silent && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:win: node scripts/preflight-frontend.js && cd frontend && npm install --silent && npm run dev
scripts.stop:mac: npm run stop:backend:mac && npm run stop:frontend:mac
scripts.stop:win: npm run stop:backend:win && npm run stop:frontend:win
